name: ai-implementation-protocol
description: A portable, skill-based protocol for AI project continuity: living docs (OVERVIEW/decisions/knowledge/reference/inbox/conventions), self-growth knowledge, and a hygiene gate. Zero-dependency; AI-driven, install into any repo and run $aip init.

interface.shortDescription: Skill-based protocol for AI project continuity.
interface.longDescription: AI Implementation Protocol packages a skill and supporting scripts that maintain project-level living docs (OVERVIEW/decisions/knowledge/reference/inbox/conventions), grow a verified-knowledge base, and enforce a hygiene gate. Zero-config: install into any repo and run $aip init; the rest is AI-driven.
